curation_notes: Pre-assigned as sql-injection from CWE-89, but the patch adds Zope access control decorators (@security.private and @security.protected) to the query() and add_extra_engine_options() methods — it does not sanitize SQL input. The root cause is missing authentication/authorization checks, not unsanitized SQL interpolation. Reclassified to auth-bypass. Locations derived directly from the patch diff: both vulnerable methods are in the SAWrapper class in da.py. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern.
